messages.content: het list my most recent issuesm, maybe 5 of them

Here are your 5 most recent issues:

1. MAR-397: pozbierac wszystkie dokumenty dla pani od podatkow i wysluchac jeszcze raz nagrania audio z nia - zrobic transkrpcje (In Progress, Urgent) – Due: 2025-07-09
   - Link: MAR-397

2. MAR-344: zajac sie porzadnie regeneracja watroby - wrzucic prawidlowe skladniki regularnie do diety (Todo, Urgent) – Due: 2025-07-18
   - Link: MAR-344

3. MAR-455: poprosic patryka o wygenerowanie tego tax dokumentu w Partner Life portalu w lichtenstein, bo to co mozemy dostac w prosperity podobno nie jest wystarczajace (In Progress, Urgent) – Due: 2025-07-18
   - Link: MAR-455

4. MAR-430: add an idea of termination message to the agent loop (In Progress, Urgent)
   - Link: MAR-430

5. MAR-431: add a summary agent that will always summarize multi agent conversation (Triage, Urgent)
   - Link: MAR-431

Let me know if you want more details or actions on any of these!
You’re welcome! 😊 If you need anything else or want to update any issues, just let me know!
